Free strategy session

Privacy

Last updated June 2026

Kitchen Websites collects only what you give us: the answers and contact details you enter in the Google Scorecard, and our booking and contact forms. We use them to send your scorecard, follow up about the work, and improve the tools.

What we collect

  • Your name, email, business name, and the answers you give when you book a session or use our tools.
  • Standard analytics (page views, events) via Meta Pixel and, optionally, Google Analytics.

What we don’t do

We don’t sell your information. We don’t run a 14-email nurture machine. You can unsubscribe anytime.

Contact

Questions about your data: shane@kitchenwebsites.com.
